title: Sour Velvet Australian Gruyère Pâté
description: A velvety and tangy dessert pâté featuring smooth Gruyère cheese with a touch of sour cream for an indulgent and romantic treat, suitable for halal dietary restrictions.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine sour cream and melted butter. Mix well until smooth.
Add Gruyère cheese and whisk into the sour cream mixture until combined smoothly.
Blend in heavy cream, vanilla extract, and ground cinnamon. Mix thoroughly.
Season with salt to taste. Gently fold the mixture together to avoid toughening the texture.
Transfer the mixture into a greased baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until set. Let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve chilled as an elegant dessert pâté.
